reason: Successfully executed browser tool to navigate to example.com and retrieve page title
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface displaying list of agents
Step 2 - Found and clicked "QA-20260513-025517-u5jl" agent in the sidebar - Agent page loaded with chat interface and configuration options
Step 3 - Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input box - Message appeared in input field
Step 4 - Clicked Send message button - Agent started working and executed browser tools:

Step 5 - Waited for response and verified "Example Domain" mentioned - Response received within 12 seconds stating: **"The page title is "Example Domain"."** - Test completed successfully with screenshot captured
